TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tjadukudukung i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjadukudukung. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjadukudukung sa, 235 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 663 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 413 ku tademaw, pakalatu 62%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 250 ku tademaw, pakalatu 38%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 59%, Amis 2%, Rukai 1%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: tjadukudukuŋ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjadukudukuŋ. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjadukudukuŋ sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, amis *%, *ukai *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Tjadukudukung i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjadukudukung. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjadukudukung sa, 235 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 663 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 413 ku tademaw, pakalatu 62%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 250 ku tademaw, pakalatu 38%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 59%, Amis 2%, Rukai 1%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: tjadukudukuŋ i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjadukudukuŋ. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjadukudukuŋ sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, amis *%, *ukai *%, zumazuma *%.
